name: fnir-project-resource-guide
description: Portable pointer to session-local copied fNIR MATLAB scripts/resources and their README guide.
reason: User asked to copy workspace fNIR files into the sessionID folder and document their roles.
content:
Context file: fnir-project-resource-guide
Description: Session-local copied fNIR MATLAB scripts/resources.
Last updated by: agent on 2026-05-26.

This session includes a copied reference package of the workspace fNIR MATLAB files under the session directory at relative path: resources/fnir-matlab/.

Read resources/fnir-matlab/README.md for a file-by-file guide and recommended workflow. The copied resources include beta scripts, HuiChuang and Hitachi variants, FC/WTC scripts, epoch WTC, FOI selection, beta outlier-cleaning scripts, fdr helpers, wavelet denoise helper, xjview template resources, and a WTC interest-frequency Excel reference.

Important: these copied files are reference resources for the session template. For real analysis, inspect the user's current workspace and data files first; do not assume the copied session files are the active analysis files unless the user explicitly says so.
